name: Spiders of Mirkwood
text: While it is engaged with you, Spiders of Mirkwood gets +1 [attack] for each exhausted character you control.

name: Great Spider
text: Forced: After Gret Spider engages you, exhaust a character you control.

name: The Eaves of Mirkwood
text: While The Eaves of Mirkwood is the active location, encounter card effects cannot be canceled.

name: Tangled Grove
text: X is the number of locations in the staging area.Travel: Each player must discard 1 random card from his hand to travel here.

name: Forest Gate
text: Response: After you travel to Forest Gate, the first player draws 2 cards.

name: Spider Den
text: Quest Action: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Spider enemy and put it into play engaged with you to discard Spider Den. (Any player may trigger this effect.)

name: Goblin Trail
text: Travel: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck to travel here.Response: When Goblin Trail leaves play as an explored location, place 6 progress on the current quest.

name: Driven by Shadow
text: When Revealed: Each enemy and each location currently in the staging area gets +1 [threat] until the end of the phase. If there are no cards in the staging area, Driven by Shadow gains surge.

name: Surprising Speed
text: When Revealed: Each player returns 1 enemy engaged with him to the staging area. If no enemy was returned to the staging area this way, Surprising Speed gains surge and doomed 1.

name: Caught in a Web
text: When Revealed: The player with the highest threat level attached this card to one of his heroes. (Counts as a Condition attachment with the text: `Attached hero does not ready during the refresh phase unless you pay 2 resources from that hero`s pool.`)

name: Goblin Troop
text: Cannot have attachments.While Goblin Troop is engaged with you, each other Goblin enemy engaged with you gets +1 [attack] and +1 [defense].

name: Goblin Sniper
text: During the encounter phase, players cannot optionally engage Goblin Sniper if there are other enemies in the staging area.Forced: If Goblin Sniper is in the staging area at the end of the combat phase, each player deals 1 point of damage to 1 character he controls.

name: Goblintown Scavengers
text: When Revealed: Discard the top card of each player`s deck. Until the end of the phase, increase Goblintown Savengers` [threat] by the total printed cost of all cards discarded in this way.

name: Goblins are Upon You!
text: When Revealed: Each player must search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Goblin enemy and put it into play, engaged with him. Then, shuffle the encounter deck. (This effect cannot be canceled.)

name: Eyes in the Dark
text: When Revealed: Each player must choose: Either raise your threat by 1 for each questing character you control, or discard a questing character you control.

name: Goblin Chieftain
text: X is the stage number of the quest.Cannot take damage. Cannot have attachments.Forced: After Goblin Chieftain attacks, either remove X progress from the quest, or return it to the staging area.

name: Cracked Pillar
text: While Cracked Pillar is in the staging area, it gains: `The first player may declare an attack against Cracked Pillar during the combat phase as if it was an enemy engaged with him. Use Cracked Pillar`s [threat] as its [defense] during this attack.`Travel: Remove 4 damage from Cracked Pillar to travel here.

name: Cave Torch
text: Attach to a hero.Action: Exhause Cave Torch to place up to 3 progress tokens on a Dark location.Forced: After Cave Torch exhausts, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is an enemy, add it to the staging area.

name: Great Cave-troll
text: Cannot have attachments.For each point of excess combat damage dealt by Great Cave-troll (damage that is dealt beyond the remaining hit points of the character damaged by its attack) remove 1 progress from the current quest.

name: Cavern Warg
text: Response: When Cavern Warg attacks you, exhaust Cave Torch to cancel the attack and return Cavern Warg to the staging area.

name: Goblin Tunnels
text: While Goblin Tunnels is in the staging area, it gains: `Forced: After a Goblin is revealed from the encounter deck, remove a progress token from the current quest card.`

name: Lightless Passage
text: Travel: Players must exhaust a Cave Torch to travel here.

name: Branching Paths
text: While Branching Paths is in the staging area, each Dark location gets +1 [threat].Forced: After Branching Paths leaves play as an explored location, look at the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Players must choose 1 of those to reveal and add to the staging area, moving the other 2 to the bottom of the deck.

name: Collapsed Mine
text: While Collapsed Mine is in the staging area, no more than 4 progress can be placed on the quest each round.

name: Goblin Dungeon
text: Travel: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck to travel here.Response: After Goblin Dungeon leaves play as an explored location, the first player searches the top 5 cards of his deck for an ally and puts it into play under his control. Shuffle the rest of the searched cards back into his deck.

name: Crumbling Ruin
text: When Revealed: Each player must exhaust a character and discard the top card of his deck, if able. If the printed cost of the discarded card is equal to or higher than the remaining hit points of the exhausted character, discard the exhausted character.

name: Lost in the Dark
text: When Revealed: The player who controls Cave Torch must choose: Either exhaust Cave Torch, or progress cannot be placed on the quest until the end of the phase. (Progress can still be placed on the active location.)

name: Watchful Eyes
text: When Revealed: The first player attaches Watchful Eyes to one of his heroes. (Counts as a Condition attachment with the text: `Limit 1 per hero. Forced: If attached hero is exhausted at the end of the combat phase, reveal 1 card from the encounter deck and add it to the staging area.`)

name: After the Raid
text: Setup: Search the encounter deck for 1 copy of The Eaves of Mirkwood and Goblin Troop. Add The Eaves of Mirkwood to the staging area and set Goblin Troop aside, out of play. Shuffle of the encounter deck.

name: After the Raid
text: Setup: Search the encounter deck for 1 copy of The Eaves of Mirkwood and Goblin Troop. Add The Eaves of Mirkwood to the staging area and set Goblin Troop aside, out of play. Shuffle of the encounter deck.

name: Mirkwood Forest
text: When Revealed: Each player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a Forest location and adds it to the staging area. Shuffle the encounter deck. This stage cannot be defeated unless at least 1 copy of Goblin Trail is in the vitory display.

name: The Rearguard
text: When Revealed: The first player adds the set-aside Goblin Troop to the staging area. Each other player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a Goblin enemy and adds it to the staging area.

name: The Rearguard
text: When Revealed: The first player adds the set-aside Goblin Troop to the staging area. Each other player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a Goblin enemy and adds it to the staging area.This stage cannot be defeated while Goblin Troop is in play. When this stage is defeated, the heroes discover the trail to the Goblins` secret lair and the players win the game.

name: The Dark of Nibin-Dûm
text: Setup: Search the encounter deck for Goblin Chieftain, Cracked Pillar, and Cave Torch. Set Goblin Chieftain and Cracked Pillar aside, out of play. The first player attached Cave Torch to one of his heroes. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: The Dark of Nibin-Dûm
text: Setup: Search the encounter deck for Goblin Chieftain, Cracked Pillar, and Cave Torch. Set Goblin Chieftain and Cracked Pillar aside, out of play. The first player attached Cave Torch to one of his heroes. Shuffle the encounter deck.When Revealed: Each player searches the encounter deck for a different location and adds it to the staging area. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Surprise Attack
text: When Revealed: Add Goblin Chieftain to the staging area. Each player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a different enemy of his choice and adds it to the staging area. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Surprise Attack
text: When Revealed: Add Goblin Chieftain to the staging area. Each player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a different enemy of his choice and adds it to the staging area. Shuffle the encounter deck.During the encounter phase, treat each enemy`s engagement cost as if it were 0.The stage gets +4 quest points for each enemy in play.

name: The Chasm
text: When Revealed: Set Goblin Chieftain aside, out of play. Add Cracked Pillar to the staging area.

name: The Chasm
text: When Revealed: Set Goblin Chieftain aside, out of play. Add Cracked Pillar to the staging area.Forced: Reveal an additional encounter card during the quest phase.Progress cannot be placed on Cracked Pillar while it is in the staging area.After Cracked Pillar leaves play as an explored location, advance to stage 4A.

name: Oathkeepers
text: When Revealed: Add Goblin Chieftain to the staging area.

name: Oathkeepers
text: When Revealed: Add Goblin Chieftain to the staging area.While there are at least 8 progress tokens on this stage, Goblin Chieftain loses the text: `Cannot take damage.`This stage cannot be defeated while Goblin Chieftain is in play. When this stage is defeated, the heroes rescue the captives, fulfilling their oaths, and the players win the game!

name: Abandoned Camp
text: Response: After the players travel to Abandoned Camp, the first player discards the top card of their deck, If that card is any ally, put it into play under their control.Travel: Discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is an enemy, add it to the staging area.

name: Wild Wargs
text: Forced: After Wild Wargs engages you, discrad the top card of the encounter deck. If that card is a Goblin enemy, put it into play engaged with you.

name: Obsidian Arrows
text: When Revealed: Deal 2 damage to a character you control.
shadow: Shadow: Deal 1 damage to a character you control.

name: Crumbling Stairs
text: While Crumbling Stairs is in the staging area, progress cannot be placed on it. Forced: When Crumbling Stairs leaves play as an explored location, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If the discarded card is a location, put it into play as the active location.
